prestazioni: Engine swap to a military-spec 6.5L Detroit Diesel V8 (engine code: 6.5L TD V8, L56/L65) with a Banks Power Sidewinder turbo system (GT42 Garrett turbocharger, 3.5-inch stainless downpipe, and custom intercooler piping) for 350+ HP and 650 lb-ft of torque, paired with a 4L80E heavy-duty transmission reinforced with a Sonnax HD2 torque converter and a PPE deep transmission pan for extreme off-road durability.

Suspension overhaul with a Fox Racing 2.0 Factory Series 4.0 Performance Series remote-reservoir coilover kit (14-inch travel, 3.0-inch diameter shocks) and a custom-fabricated 4-link rear suspension with Currie Enterprises 9-inch RockJock axles (4.88 gear ratio, ARB air lockers, and 35-spline chromoly axles) for rock-crawling capability.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a TeraFlex Heavy-Duty transfer case skid plate, a custom-fabricated 1-ton Dana 60 front axle (high-pinion, 35-spline chromoly shafts, and Warn 16.5ti winch), and a dual-battery system (Optima YellowTop D31T deep-cycle batteries) with a National Luna 12V/220V inverter for auxiliary power.
estetica: Custom military-inspired widebody conversion using a Poison Spyder Customs M1025-specific tube fender kit (12.5-inch flare extensions, powder-coated matte black) paired with a set of Hutchinson Rock Monster beadlock wheels (17x10, -38mm offset) wrapped in 40-inch Nitto Trail Grappler M/T tires for a tactical overland look.

Front-end reinforcement with a custom-fabricated ARB bumper (winch-ready, integrated D-ring mounts, and a Warn Zeon 12-S Platinum winch) and a Rigid Industries E-Series Pro LED light bar (50-inch, 20,000-lumen output) mounted on a Poison Spyder Customs roof rack with a Maxtrax recovery board holder.

Exterior camouflage using a Line-X XS-100 military-grade spray-on bedliner (MATTE OD Green, textured finish) with custom vinyl overlays (MultiCam Alpine pattern) and a set of RotopaX fuel/water canisters (2x 4-gallon, mounted on the rear quarter panels) for a functional, stealthy appearance.
